title: Heuristic speed without an optimality guarantee
prompt: A heuristic quickly constructs feasible crew schedules and performed well on a small synthetic test set. It supplies no lower bound or optimality certificate. Frame the value of rapid feasibility for planning deadlines without calling solutions optimal or generalizing beyond tested instances.

model_specification.mechanism: Priority rules build a feasible assignment rapidly but do not bound distance from the optimum.

fidelity_requirements: Evidence is limited to synthetic tests

evidence_needs.claim: The method meets real planning deadlines
